rbac_conflicts.description: jdoe is a member of both proj_x and proj_y; both have standard partition access. Combined QoS priority may exceed per-user fairshare limit.
rbac_conflicts.resolution: Set default_account=proj_x; require --account=proj_y for explicit proj_y submissions.

pending_changes: Add jdoe to LDAP group proj_y_members
Grant gpu partition submit permission under account proj_y
Update slurm QoS association: user=jdoe account=proj_y partition=gpu maxgpuperjob=2
